close_reason: Implemented go-deps-extract binary using go list -json. Correctly classifies stdlib/external/internal imports, separates test imports.
description:
# Go Extractor

Reference implementation of a dependency extractor for Go.

## Location
```
src/cmd/go-deps-extract/
└── main.go
```

## Approach

Use `go list -json` for accurate import detection:
- Leverages Go's own tooling
- Handles build tags correctly
- Understands test files
- No regex parsing

## Tasks

- [ ] Create go-deps-extract binary
- [ ] Use `go list -json ./...` for import detection
- [ ] Handle standard library vs external vs internal imports
- [ ] Handle test files (separate from main package)
- [ ] Output extraction protocol JSON
- [ ] Integration tests
title: Phase 3: Go Extractor
